name: Nocturne Automatic
shortDescription: Slim dress watch with guilloché dial and rose gold accents.
description: The Nocturne embodies quiet luxury: a hand-finished guilloché dial, applied indices in rose gold, and an in-house automatic calibre visible through a sapphire case back. Water resistant to 50m.

name: Marina Diver Pro
shortDescription: Ceramic bezel and 300m depth rating for serious collectors.
description: Engineered for the abyss: ceramic unidirectional bezel, luminous markers with long-lasting Super-LumiNova, and a helium escape valve. The Marina Diver Pro is tested beyond industry standards.

name: Stratus Pilot GMT
shortDescription: Dual-time complication with bi-directional slide rule.
description: Inspired by vintage cockpit instruments, the Stratus GMT pairs a 24-hour hand with a refined slide rule bezel. Ideal for travelers who refuse to compromise on legibility.

name: Circuit Chronograph
description: A motorsport soul in a tailored case. The Circuit uses a column-wheel architecture for crisp pusher feel and a vertical clutch that eliminates hand jump on start.

name: Solstice Moonphase
shortDescription: Aventurine sky with photorealistic moon disc.
description: Each Solstice dial is a unique slice of deep blue aventurine glass. The moonphase advances with astronomical precision, requiring adjustment only once every 122 years.

name: Granite Sport
shortDescription: Integrated bracelet and textured dial in slate tones.
description: The Granite collection brings integrated-bracelet ergonomics to daily wear. Textured dial catches light like brushed stone; the bracelet tapers for wrist comfort.

name: Equinox Ultra-Thin
description: Sculpted for evening wear: an ultra-thin case houses a micro-rotor calibre that preserves a slim silhouette without sacrificing power reserve.

name: Apex Regatta Timer
description: Developed with competitive sailors: programmable countdown, high-contrast dial, and screw-down pushers that secure against spray.
